docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF RELATED CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREITAS, SUZANN

MASS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREITAS, SUZANN AS TO DEFENDANT WYETH, LLC SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-09-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-09-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-26-2012 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE

THIS CASE HAS BEEN COORDINATED WITH JCCP 4631: THE REGLAN/METOCLPORAMIDE CASES. THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE PREVIOUSLY SCHEDULED IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: RICHARD A. KRAMER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. (304)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO PLAINTIFF FREITAS, SUZANN
